holdings.infoBox: SOVF is an equity ETF with a total of 78 individual holdings. The top holdings are Molina Healthcare stock at 5.00%, Insperity at 4.03%, Vistra at 3.82%, Repay Holdings at 3.45%, and Paycom Software at 3.45%.

overview.description: The Sovereign's Capital Flourish Fund (SOVF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in 80 to 100 US companies whose leaders seek to build corporate cultures based on biblical values. SOVF was launched on Oct 3, 2023 and is issued by Sovereign's.
